name: usm-cs-report-template
description: USM CS LaTeX report template with bundled agent skills for report creation, compilation, diagnostics, and runtime setup.

interface.shortDescription: LaTeX report template with compile support
interface.longDescription: Create USM School of Computer Sciences coursework reports from a reusable LaTeX template, then use bundled support skills to diagnose, compile, or bootstrap LaTeX support on agent machines.
defaultPrompt: Create a USM CS LaTeX assignment report.
Compile this LaTeX report and fix errors.
Check whether this machine can build LaTeX PDFs.
